ogTitle: Holland Park West vs Hollywell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Holland Park West and Hollywell.
heading: Holland Park West vs Hollywell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Holland Park West, Queensland and Hollywell, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hollywell has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Holland Park West (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Holland Park West or Hollywell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Holland Park West has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Hollywell scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Holland Park West scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Hollywell scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Holland Park West or Hollywell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hollywell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
